summary: Occupation/trait renames, sandbox option type change, distribution weightChance fix, security-restricted Lua filesystem access

changes.description: Occupation 'Fire Officer' renamed to 'Firefighter' — update profession string comparisons
changes.context: Occupation renamed in 42.16; mods checking getProfession() against this string will not match

changes.description: Occupation 'Angler' renamed to 'Fishing Guide' — update profession string comparisons
changes.context: Occupation renamed in 42.16; mods checking getProfession() against "Angler" will not match

changes.description: Trait 'Wilderness Knowledge' renamed to 'Bushcrafter' — update trait ID references
changes.context: Trait renamed in 42.16; hasTrait/addTrait calls using the old ID will silently fail

changes.description: 'Firearms use damage chance' sandbox option changed from boolean to dropdown integer — boolean comparisons will break
changes.context: SandboxVars.FirearmsUseDamageChance is now an integer (0/1/2), not true/false; if-truthy checks still work but == true/== false will not

changes.description: Distribution procLists entries without explicit weightChance now spawn nothing — previously used implicit equal weighting
changes.replacement: Add explicit weightChance to every entry in each procLists table
changes.context: 42.16 fixed procLists multi-entry behavior; mods defining loot tables without weightChance were silently broken and now spawn nothing at all

changes.description: Lua filesystem access restricted by 42.16.3 security patch — io/os file operations may be blocked or silently fail
changes.replacement: Use PZ built-in file APIs instead of raw Lua io/os calls
changes.context: April 2026 security patch (42.16.3) restricted Lua filesystem access following a malicious mod incident affecting 500-2200 users; exact API restrictions not published
